compiled_state.title: [075a-b781] GREEN: Run migrate-comment-refs.py on plugins/dso/ to rewrite all comment self-references
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
Story: 075a-b781

## What to do
Execute the migration script to rewrite ~137 comment lines across ~77 shell files in plugins/dso/.

## Steps

### Step 1: Dry-run preview
```bash
python3 plugins/dso/scripts/migrate-comment-refs.py --dry-run --verbose plugins/dso/
```
Review the output. Expected: ~137 comment lines flagged across ~77 files.

### Step 2: Apply migration
```bash
python3 plugins/dso/scripts/migrate-comment-refs.py plugins/dso/
```

### Step 3: Verify with test
```bash
bash tests/hooks/test-no-plugin-comment-refs.sh
```
Must return exit 0.

### Step 4: Run unit tests
```bash
poetry run pytest tests/scripts/test-migrate-comment-refs.py -v
```
All must pass GREEN.

## What counts as success
- tests/hooks/test-no-plugin-comment-refs.sh exits 0
- All 6 unit tests in test-migrate-comment-refs.py pass
- No code lines (non-comment lines) were modified
- grep -rn 'plugins/dso' plugins/dso/ --include='*.sh' returns only lines without leading '#'

## Files modified
- plugins/dso/scripts/*.sh (~77 files, comment lines only)
- plugins/dso/hooks/**/*.sh (comment lines only)

## Depends on: 20b6-7be1 (implementation), 2b5c-5bac (RED verification test)
## testing_mode: GREEN
